passiveEffect: Flame Aura - Deals minor fire damage to enemies in close proximity each turn.
activeEffect: Ring of Fire - Creates a fiery ring that traps and burns enemies for three turns.
description: A fiery feline that prowls the volcanic regions. Its paws are engulfed in eternal flames, allowing it to scorch enemies with a swipe. It can also summon a ring of fire to trap opponents. Flamepaw Lynxes are known for their agility and fierce independence.

passiveEffect: Water Veil: Reduces water-based damage by 50%.
activeEffect: Tidal Surge: Summons a massive tidal wave, dealing water damage to all enemies and reducing their speed for three turns.
description: This serpentine creature glides through the air as if swimming in water. Its translucent scales shimmer like the ocean surface at dawn. The Aqua Drifter can summon tidal waves and rainstorms, making it a formidable foe in open areas. It's often seen as a guardian of aquatic realms.

passiveEffect: Thorny Defense: Reflects 10% of melee damage received back to the attacker.
activeEffect: Entangling Vines: Ensnare an enemy, reducing their speed by 50% for 3 turns.
description: A towering construct of intertwined vines and thorns, the Bramble Golem serves as a protector of forested domains. Its tough exterior allows it to withstand significant damage, while its thorny appendages can ensnare and crush intruders. It's slow but relentless in its pursuit.

passiveEffect: Emits a soothing glow that gradually restores health to nearby allies.
activeEffect: Dazzling Light - Temporarily blinds and confuses all enemies in a small area.
description: A tiny, luminescent creature that flits about in dark caverns. The Glimmer Sprite emits a soothing glow that can heal allies and confuse enemies with dazzling light displays. It's often underestimated due to its small size but is highly valued for its support capabilities.

passiveEffect: Shadow Meld - Increases evasion by 20% in dark environments.
activeEffect: Night Strike - A powerful attack that deals double damage when used from a shadowed position.
description: Dwelling in the deepest shadows of dungeons, the Shadow Wyrm is a sleek, dragon-like entity that thrives in darkness. It can meld into shadows to evade attacks and strike from the darkness with precision. Its presence is often heralded by a chilling drop in temperature.

passiveEffect: Once per battle, revive with 50% health upon defeat.
activeEffect: Incinerate: Deal massive fire damage to all enemies, with a chance to burn.
description: A majestic bird engulfed in flames, the Blazewing Phoenix is a symbol of rebirth. It can revive itself once per battle and incinerate foes with its fiery talons.

passiveEffect: Water Veil - Immune to burn status effects.
activeEffect: Tidal Wave - Summon a massive wave causing area damage and reducing enemy speed.
description: A sleek, water-dwelling creature that can summon tidal waves to wash away enemies. Its serpentine body glistens with scales that reflect the colors of the ocean.

passiveEffect: Cold Aura: Reduces incoming physical damage by 10% due to freezing temperatures.
activeEffect: Blizzard Summon: Temporarily reduces all opponents' speed by 20% and deals ice damage over time.
description: This massive, fur-covered beast roams the icy regions. It can summon blizzards to freeze opponents in their tracks and has immense physical strength.

passiveEffect: Thorny Aura - Deals damage to attackers when hit with physical attacks.
activeEffect: Vine Entangle - Roots target in place and drains their energy over time.
description: A towering tree-like guardian of the forest. Its body is covered in sharp thorns, and it can entangle foes with vine-like limbs to drain their energy.

passiveEffect: Wind's Grace: Increases evasion by 15% when health is below 50%.
activeEffect: Tempest Fury: Unleashes a storm that deals heavy air damage to all enemies and increases the Djinn's speed by 20% for the next 3 turns.
description: A mystical wind spirit that rides the lightning. It can control storms to strike enemies with thunderbolts and vanish in a puff of smoke to avoid attacks.

passiveEffect: Phasing - Can pass through walls and terrain, avoiding physical obstacles.
activeEffect: Shadow Fear - Reduces the willpower of all enemies within range, decreasing their attack and defense temporarily.
description: An ethereal entity formed from pure darkness. It can phase through walls and unleash fear-inducing shadows that sap the willpower of its enemies.

passiveEffect: Reflects 10% of magical damage back to the attacker.
activeEffect: Earth Shield - Temporarily reduces incoming damage by 50% for 2 turns.
description: A construct of living crystal, known for its resilience. It can reflect magical attacks and harness energy from the earth to bolster its defenses.

passiveEffect: Leaves a trail of fire that deals damage over time to enemies who step on it.
activeEffect: Breathes out scorching embers in a cone, dealing massive fire damage and burning enemies over time.
description: A fearsome canine enveloped in flames. It leaves a trail of fire wherever it runs and can breathe out scorching embers to engulf its foes.

passiveEffect: Illusion Sight - Can see through illusions and detect hidden enemies.
activeEffect: Mystic Roar - Temporarily increases all allies' attack and defense by 20% for 3 turns.
description: A hybrid creature with the strength of a bear and the wisdom of an owl. It can see through illusions and track enemies with its keen senses.

passiveEffect: Poisonous Aura - Nearby enemies take minor poison damage over time.
activeEffect: Venomous Fury - Increases attack power and applies poison damage to all attacks for a limited time.
description: A dragon-like creature with poisonous scales. It can spit venomous projectiles and uses its tail to lash out at foes with toxic barbs.

passiveEffect: Icicle Armor - Reduces damage taken by 15% when in water environments.
activeEffect: Glacial Surge - Freezes all enemies within range, immobilizing them for 3 turns.
description: A colossal sea beast of icy origins. It can create icebergs to trap ships and freeze the water around it to immobilize its enemies.

passiveEffect: Radiance: Increases the accuracy of all fire-based attacks by 10%.
activeEffect: Solar Flare: Blinds all opponents for two turns, reducing their accuracy by 50%.
description: A regal creature with the body of a lion and the wings of an eagle. It can summon solar flares to blind and burn its opponents.

passiveEffect: Intangible Veil: Occasionally becomes intangible, reducing incoming damage by 50% for a short duration.
activeEffect: Portal of Chaos: Opens a portal to another realm, unleashing chaotic energy that damages all enemies.
description: A draconic entity from another realm. It can open portals to unleash chaotic energy and become intangible to evade attacks.

passiveEffect: Mimicry - Copies a random passive effect of an adjacent enemy each turn.
activeEffect: Liquid Shift - Transforms into a state that reduces incoming damage by 50% for 2 turns.
description: A mercurial blob that shifts its form rapidly. It can mimic the abilities of other creatures and slip through small spaces with ease.

passiveEffect: Reduces all physical damage taken by 50%.
activeEffect: Roll into a ball and charge at enemies, dealing massive physical damage and stunning them.
description: A heavily armored insect that is nearly impervious to physical attacks. It can roll into a ball to charge at enemies and crush them under its weight.

passiveEffect: Glowing Aura: Allies gain a 10% boost to speed in dim environments.
activeEffect: Mesmerize: Stuns all nearby enemies for 2 turns with its radiant glow.
description: A delicate insect that glows with a soft, ethereal light. It can mesmerize opponents with its luminescence and guide allies through darkness.

passiveEffect: Lava Shield - Reduces fire damage taken by 30%.
activeEffect: Eruption - Summons a volcanic eruption that deals massive fire damage to all enemies.
description: A gigantic bird that dwells near volcanoes. It can summon eruptions and create molten boulders to rain down upon its foes.

passiveEffect: Ghostly Aura - Reduces enemy accuracy by 20% when nearby.
activeEffect: Mind Control - Temporarily takes control of one enemy, forcing them to attack their allies.
description: A ghostly avian creature with a haunting melody. It can control minds with its song and create illusions to confuse and disorient enemies.

passiveEffect: Grants nearby allies a 10% boost in defense by raising stone barriers.
activeEffect: Slams the ground to create a shockwave that stuns enemies for 2 seconds.
description: A gargantuan creature made of rocks and soil. It can shake the ground with its footsteps and create barriers of stone to protect its allies.

passiveEffect: Leaves a trail of burning ash that deals minor fire damage over time to enemies who pass through it.
activeEffect: Ignites the air around it in a fiery explosion, dealing fire damage to all nearby enemies and temporarily vanishing to avoid attacks.
description: A small, fiery sprite that flits about leaving trails of ash. It can ignite the air around it to create explosive bursts and vanish in a flash.

passiveEffect: Increases dodge rate by 20% when health is above 50%.
activeEffect: Creates a whirlwind that deals damage and reduces enemy accuracy for 3 turns.
description: A nimble air spirit that rides the winds. It can create powerful gusts to disarm foes and move with blinding speed across the battlefield.

passiveEffect: Stealthy Aura: Reduces chance of being detected by enemies.
activeEffect: Shadow Pounce: Teleports behind a target and delivers a critical strike.
description: A sleek, black feline with a shadowy aura. It can blend into darkness to stalk its prey and strike with deadly precision.

passiveEffect: Ice Aura - Nearby enemies have reduced speed.
activeEffect: Blizzard Summon - Unleashes a snowstorm that reduces visibility and damages enemies over time.
description: A massive wolf with icy breath. It can freeze its prey with a single bite and summon snowstorms to cloak its approach.

passiveEffect: Petrifying Gaze - Reduces enemy speed by 10% when they attack.
activeEffect: Arcane Burst - Unleashes a burst of arcane energy dealing massive damage.
description: A mythical reptile with eyes that petrify. It can cast powerful spells and its scales shimmer with arcane symbols.

passiveEffect: Heat Aura: Slightly increases nearby allies' fire resistance.
activeEffect: Inferno Burst: Engulfs the area in flames, dealing fire damage to all enemies.
description: A small reptile that thrives in heat. It can spew fire and heat up its body to scorch anything it touches.

passiveEffect: Shell Shield - Increases defense by 20% when health drops below 50%.
activeEffect: Tremor Stomp - Causes a small earthquake that has a chance to stun enemies.
description: A massive tortoise with a shell as hard as rock. It can retract into its shell to withstand attacks and cause tremors with its movements.

passiveEffect: Glow Shroud: Increases evasion by 10% in dark environments.
activeEffect: Galactic Pulse: Emits a burst of light that disorients enemies, reducing their accuracy by 20% for 2 turns.
description: A translucent sea creature that glows like a galaxy. It can emit pulses of light to disorient foes and release electrical shocks.

passiveEffect: Regenerates 5% health every turn in forest environments.
activeEffect: Ensnare an opponent, reducing their speed by 50% for 3 turns.
description: A plant-like creature with long, vine-like limbs. It can swing through forests with ease and ensnare opponents with its tendrils.

passiveEffect: Stunning Aura: Nearby enemies have a chance to be stunned each turn.
activeEffect: Storm Surge: Summon a storm that deals massive electric damage to all enemies.
description: A stout, horned beast that charges with the force of a thunderclap. It can summon storms and use its horns to conduct electricity.

passiveEffect: Stone Skin: Increases defense while stationary.
activeEffect: Flame Burst: Unleashes a fiery explosion causing damage to all nearby enemies.
description: A fearsome stone creature that perches atop ruins. It can breathe fire and turn to stone to resist attacks.

passiveEffect: Blends into natural surroundings, increasing evasion by 10% in forest environments.
activeEffect: Pinecone Barrage - Unleashes a flurry of pinecones, dealing damage to all enemies and reducing their speed.
description: A mischievous creature that hides in forests. It can hurl pinecones with surprising force and blend into foliage to evade capture.

passiveEffect: Stardust Aura - Gradually restores health to nearby allies.
activeEffect: Radiant Flight - Temporarily increases speed and renders allies immune to status effects.
attack_1: Healing Light - Restores health to a single ally.
attack_2: Star Burst - Deals celestial damage to all enemies.
attack_3: Comet Charge - A powerful physical attack with a chance to stun.
attack_4: Celestial Shield - Raises defense of all allies for a short duration.
description: A celestial horse with wings aglow with stardust. It can heal allies with its radiant light and soar through the night sky.

passiveEffect: Heat Aura: Causes minor fire damage to nearby enemies each turn.
activeEffect: Lava Plume: Unleashes a wave of lava that deals massive fire damage to all enemies on the battlefield.
description: A being of molten rock and flame. It can spew lava and create fissures in the ground to trap foes.

passiveEffect: Heals a small amount of health to nearby allies every turn.
activeEffect: Creates a rainbow that boosts allies' morale, increasing their attack and defense for a short duration.
description: A tiny, winged spirit of the morning dew. It can heal wounds with its touch and create rainbows to inspire hope.

passiveEffect: Immune to burn damage
activeEffect: Fires a massive fireball that deals area damage
description: A three-headed beast with fiery breath. It can fly with its dragon wings and lash out with a snake-like tail.

passiveEffect: Gains a stealth bonus when in sandy terrain, reducing the chance of being hit by 15%.
activeEffect: Summons a sandstorm that reduces all enemy accuracy by 20% and increases its own evasion by 25% for 3 turns.
description: A desert-dwelling predator with venomous pincers. It can summon sandstorms to obscure its movements and strike from beneath the sand.

passiveEffect: Increases evasion by 15% when in shadowy areas.
activeEffect: Moonlit Burst - Temporarily increases speed and attack power by 25% under moonlight.
description: A silent predator that hunts by moonlight. It can move unseen in shadows and its eyes glow with an eerie silver light.

passiveEffect: Regenerates health when submerged in water.
activeEffect: Creates a massive whirlpool that immobilizes and damages all enemies in its radius.
description: A colossal sea monster with tentacles of steel. It can crush ships with ease and create whirlpools to drag foes underwater.

passiveEffect: Purify - Automatically purifies nearby water sources.
activeEffect: Radiant Light - Dispels darkness and weakens shadow creatures.
description: A mythical creature with a shimmering horn. It can purify water and dispel darkness with its radiant light.

passiveEffect: Increases fire damage of all allies by 10%.
activeEffect: Unleashes a fiery roar that deals fire damage to all enemies and reduces their defense by 20% for 3 turns.
description: A regal beast with a mane of flames. It can scorch the earth with its roar and lead its pride with courage and strength.

passiveEffect: Nocturnal Veil: Increases evasion by 15% in dark environments.
activeEffect: Sonic Screech: Emits a high-pitched cry that stuns enemies for 2 seconds and reduces their defense by 20% for 5 seconds.
description: A nocturnal creature with wings that blend into the night. It can emit high-pitched cries to navigate and disorient foes.

passiveEffect: Regenerates one head every 3 turns, restoring 10% health.
activeEffect: Unleashes a tidal wave, dealing massive water damage to all enemies.
description: A multi-headed sea serpent that dwells in coral reefs. It can regenerate lost heads and unleash torrents of water.

passiveEffect: Shadow Blend: Increases evasion by 10% when in dark environments.
activeEffect: Black Flame Burst: Deals heavy fire damage and has a chance to inflict 'Burn' status on enemies.
description: A dragon-like creature with scales as dark as night. It can breathe black fire and blend into shadows to ambush prey.

passiveEffect: Glimmering Aura: Increases the evasion of allies by 10%.
activeEffect: Illusory Maze: Creates an illusion that confuses all enemies, lowering their accuracy for 3 turns.
description: A glowing spirit that flickers like a candle flame. It can guide lost souls and create illusions to confuse enemies.

passiveEffect: Immunity to fire damage and increased resistance to physical attacks.
activeEffect: Triggers a volcanic eruption, dealing massive fire damage to all enemies and causing burning effect over time.
description: A dragon that dwells in fiery mountains. It can trigger volcanic eruptions and bathe its enemies in streams of magma.

passiveEffect: Adaptive Resistance: Alternately boosts fire or ice resistance based on the environment.
activeEffect: Elemental Surge: Temporarily increases both fire and ice attack power by 30%.
description: A rare creature that balances fire and ice. It can freeze and burn with equal intensity, adapting to any environment.

passiveEffect: Poisonous Aura: Gradually reduces the health of nearby enemies.
activeEffect: Mist of Corrosion: Creates a mist that reduces enemy defense and corrodes metal equipment.
description: A spirit of swamps and marshes. It can summon poisonous mists to obscure vision and corrode metal.

passiveEffect: Illusionary Veil: Increases evasion by 15% under light conditions.
activeEffect: Radiant Mirage: Creates a dazzling illusion that confuses enemies, reducing their accuracy for 3 turns.
description: A feline creature that glimmers with the colors of the aurora. It can cloak itself in light and create illusions of grandeur.

passiveEffect: Stone Skin - Reduces incoming physical damage by 10%.
activeEffect: Rollout - Transforms into a rolling ball, increasing speed and defense temporarily.
description: A stout creature with a shell of stone. It can curl into a ball to withstand attacks and roll with destructive force.

passiveEffect: Shadows of Eclipse - Reduces enemy's attack by 20% when in battle.
activeEffect: Blot Out - Creates an eclipse that reduces enemy accuracy by 50% for 3 turns.
description: A bird that heralds the end of light. It can blot out the sun with its wings and create shadows that sap strength.

passiveEffect: Venomous Aura: All creatures that attack the Crimson Tarantula have a chance to be poisoned.
activeEffect: Web Trap: Ensnare an enemy, reducing their speed and ability to dodge for 3 turns.
description: A large, red spider with venomous fangs. It can climb any surface and weave webs to ensnare unsuspecting prey.

passiveEffect: Intangible: Reduces physical damage received by 20%.
activeEffect: Life Drain: Steals 20% of the target's health and adds it to its own.
description: A ghostly figure that drifts through the night. It can become intangible and drain the life force of those it touches.

passiveEffect: Increases evasion by 10% when health is above 50%.
activeEffect: Summons a tornado that deals damage and reduces enemy speed for 2 turns.
description: A swift bird of prey that commands the skies. It can create tornadoes with its wings and dive at incredible speeds.

passiveEffect: Ocean's Grace: Increases evasion and speed in water-based environments.
activeEffect: Tidal Crash: Unleashes a massive tidal wave that damages all enemies and lowers their speed.
description: A massive bird that rides ocean currents. It can create tidal waves and soar with the grace of a sea breeze.

passiveEffect: Ember Coat - Reduces fire damage taken by 20% and has a 10% chance to ignite attackers.
activeEffect: Volcanic Pounce - Leap towards the target with explosive force, dealing massive fire damage and setting the ground ablaze.
description: A fiery feline with a coat of molten rock. It can pounce with explosive force and leave trails of fire in its wake.

passiveEffect: Thorny Hide: Reflects 10% of physical damage back to the attacker.
activeEffect: Brambleshield: Temporarily increases defense by 20% for 3 turns.
description: A large bear covered in thorns. It can roll through underbrush with ease and use its brambles as a defensive barrier.

passiveEffect: Regenerates 5% of max health every turn.
activeEffect: Animate Trees - Summons animated trees to assist in battle, increasing defense by 20% for 3 turns.
description: An ancient tree spirit that guards the forest. It can animate trees to fight and heal allies with its roots.

passiveEffect: Electric Surge: Increases speed by 20% when hit by an electric attack.
activeEffect: Storm Call: Summons a storm that increases electric attack damage for 3 turns.
description: A wolf-like creature that moves with the speed of a lightning bolt. It can summon storms and use electricity to enhance its attacks.

passiveEffect: Shimmering Aura - Reduces enemy accuracy by 10%.
activeEffect: Flash Burst - Blinds all enemies for one turn, reducing their accuracy by 50%.
description: A bright insect with iridescent wings. It can blind enemies with flashes of light and dart with incredible agility.

passiveEffect: Shadow Glide - Gains increased evasion in dark environments.
activeEffect: Hypnotic Gaze - Temporarily stuns an enemy, reducing their speed and defense.
description: A nocturnal bird with a mysterious gaze. It can hypnotize prey and glide silently to ambush its targets.

passiveEffect: Metallic Resilience: Reduces physical damage taken by 10%.
activeEffect: Iron Charge: Doubles speed and strength for 10 seconds, but halves defense.
description: A stout boar with metallic tusks. It can charge with unstoppable force and uproot trees with ease.

passiveEffect: Regenerates 5% of max health every turn in forest areas.
activeEffect: Can summon a vine shield that absorbs 30% of incoming damage for 3 turns.
description: A mythical creature with the body of a lion and the wings of an eagle. It can manipulate plants to ensnare foes.

passiveEffect: Snow Cloak: Increases evasion in snowy environments.
activeEffect: Blizzard Veil: Creates a blizzard that lowers enemy accuracy and boosts own speed for 3 turns.
description: A cunning fox with a coat of snow. It can summon blizzards to obscure its presence and move silently through the cold.

passiveEffect: Radiant Aura: Gradually heals nearby allies over time.
activeEffect: Holy Purge: Dispels all negative effects from allies and restores a portion of their health.
description: A divine snake with radiant scales. It can heal wounds and dispel curses with its holy light.

passiveEffect: Heat Shield - Reduces fire damage taken by 20%.
activeEffect: Lava Cocoon - Encase itself in a protective shell, increasing defense temporarily.
description: A small insect that thrives in volcanic regions. It can excrete lava and create protective cocoons of hardened rock.

passiveEffect: Ghostly Veil - Increases evasion by 15% when health is below 50%.
activeEffect: Phantom Strike - Becomes invisible for one turn, guaranteeing the next attack to be a critical hit.
description: A ghostly insect with razor-sharp claws. It can become invisible and strike with deadly precision.

passiveEffect: Increases water-type attack damage by 20% when near water.
activeEffect: Summons a massive whirlpool that traps and damages enemies each turn.
description: A massive sea creature with scales like sapphires. It can create whirlpools and control the tides to its advantage.

passiveEffect: Riddle Mastery: Increases critical hit chance when answering riddles correctly.
activeEffect: Sandstorm Fury: Unleashes a powerful sandstorm that damages all enemies and reduces their accuracy for 3 turns.
description: A mythical creature with the body of a lion and the head of a human. It can solve riddles and unleash sandstorms upon its foes.

passiveEffect: Camouflage: Becomes harder to hit in rocky environments, increasing evasion by 20%.
activeEffect: Rocky Ambush: Becomes invisible for one turn, then delivers a powerful strike that deals double damage.
description: A reptile that blends with rocky terrain. It can change its color to become nearly invisible and ambush prey.

passiveEffect: Immune to fire damage and gains health from fire-based attacks.
activeEffect: Molten Fury - Temporarily doubles attack power and grants fire immunity to allies for 3 turns.
description: A serpent of flame that dwells in molten caves. It can slither through fire and spew molten rock at its enemies.

passiveEffect: Chilling Aura: Reduces the speed of nearby enemies by 10%.
activeEffect: Blizzard Call: Summons a blizzard that deals ice damage and reduces visibility for enemies.
description: A dragon-like creature with icy breath. It can summon blizzards and freeze the air to create barriers of ice.

passiveEffect: Regenerate health in swampy environments.
activeEffect: Summons a Bog Monster to fight alongside her.
description: A swamp-dwelling witch with control over decay. She can summon bog monsters and manipulate plants to ensnare her enemies.

passiveEffect: Regenerates 5% health each turn in wet environments.
activeEffect: Secretes toxic slime that poisons enemies for 3 turns.
description: A large amphibian that thrives in wetlands. It can secrete toxic slime and leap great distances to evade capture.

passiveEffect: Reflective Scales - Reduces damage from light-based attacks by 20%.
activeEffect: Hypnotic Gaze - Temporarily stuns the enemy for one turn.
description: A serpent with scales that shimmer like the sun. It can hypnotize foes with its gaze and strike with blinding speed.

passiveEffect: Static Field - Reduces incoming electric damage by 15%.
activeEffect: Lightning Burst - Unleashes a burst of electric energy, dealing damage to all nearby foes.
description: A small insect that generates electricity. It can zap foes with lightning bolts and create protective fields of static energy.

passiveEffect: Shadow Veil: Becomes harder to hit in low light conditions, increasing evasion by 20%.
activeEffect: Silent Pounce: Briefly becomes invisible, then attacks for double damage.
description: A sleek predator that hunts at twilight. It can become a silhouette in the fading light and move with silent grace.

passiveEffect: Void Presence: Reduces enemy accuracy by 15% in battle.
activeEffect: Dimensional Rift: Teleports a short distance and confuses all enemies, reducing their defense by 20% for 2 turns.
description: A creature from another realm with a venomous sting. It can teleport short distances and create portals to confuse its enemies.

passiveEffect: Shell Armor - Reduces physical damage taken by 20%.
activeEffect: Tidal Wave - Creates a powerful wave that knocks back all enemies, reducing their accuracy by 15% for 2 turns.
description: A massive crustacean with a shell as hard as coral. It can create waves to knock foes off balance and crush them with its claws.

activeEffect: Gale Force: Summons a powerful windstorm that deals damage to all enemies and has a chance to disorient them.

passiveEffect: Ignition Aura: Slight chance to ignite attackers, causing them to take fire damage over time.
activeEffect: Smoke Vanish: Can disappear momentarily, evading all attacks for one turn.
description: A wolf-like creature with a coat of ash. It can ignite the air around it to create fiery bursts and vanish in a puff of smoke.

passiveEffect: Increases water element resistance by 20% for all allies.
activeEffect: Summons a massive whirlpool, dealing water damage and reducing enemy speed.
description: A dragon with scales as blue as the ocean. It can control water and create whirlpools to drown its foes.

passiveEffect: Body smolders faintly, warming the air around it.
activeEffect: Flares up, singeing a nearby foe.
description: A tiny ember-bug whose wings glow like drifting sparks. Harmless alone, but drawn to anything that burns.

passiveEffect: Rocky hide shrugs off the first scrape each fight.
activeEffect: Curls into a stone ball and rolls at a foe.
description: A pebble-shelled pup that tumbles after travelers, mistaking bootsteps for play.

passiveEffect: Damp skin cools and soothes its own wounds slowly.
activeEffect: Spits a stinging jet of pond water.
description: A palm-sized toad that hoards morning dew on its back, croaking at its own reflection.

passiveEffect: Roots into soil to sip a little life back.
activeEffect: Lashes out with a whip of new growth.
description: A seedling spirit no taller than a boot, trailing leaves that regrow as fast as they tear.

passiveEffect: Fur crackles, occasionally numbing an attacker.
activeEffect: Discharges a sharp, startling shock.
description: A jittery rodent that builds a charge by scurrying, zapping anything that corners it.

passiveEffect: Dusty wings blur its outline in dim light.
activeEffect: Scatters shadowy scales that cloud sight.
description: A dusk-loving moth whose wingbeats smear the air with soft darkness.

passiveEffect: A thin rime shields it from the first cold blow.
activeEffect: Exhales a chilling breath that slows a foe.
description: A snow-fox cub with frost-tipped fur, leaving tiny ice flowers in its tracks.

passiveEffect: Runs hotter as the fight drags on.
activeEffect: Looses a howl wreathed in flame.
description: A young fire-beast still learning to control its claws, which spark when it pounces.

passiveEffect: Reforms slightly from spilled water each turn.
activeEffect: Surges forward in a small crashing wave.
description: A pup-shaped pocket of living tidewater that giggles in bubbles and never quite dries.

passiveEffect: Bristling thorns prick anything that strikes it.
activeEffect: Charges, dragging snaring vines behind.
description: A stout boar armored in living brambles that flower in spring and bite year-round.

passiveEffect: Crystal shell blunts incoming hits.
activeEffect: Stomps to crack the ground beneath a foe.
description: A crab whose shell has grown into raw quartz, refracting torchlight into little rainbows.

passiveEffect: Rides its own draft, hard to pin down.
activeEffect: Beats its wings into a cutting gust.
description: A restless finch that never lands for long, stitching quick spirals through the wind.
